welcome.headline: Tu estudio completo de creación musical
welcome.subheadline: Crea, colabora y publica tu música con herramientas con IA e instrumentos de calidad profesional, todo en la nube.
welcome.legal_note: Al continuar, aceptas nuestros {terms_link} y nuestra {privacy_link}.

_notes.legal_note: [PLACEHOLDER] {terms_link} and {privacy_link} are inline hyperlinks. Order preserved. 'nuestros' / 'nuestra' agree with implied gendered nouns (términos / política).

_notes.finish_button: Matches welcome.cta_primary exactly — single source of truth.

signup.page_subtitle: Únete a {user_count} músicos y productores en ECHOCRAFT.
signup.field_password_hint: Usa una combinación de letras, números y símbolos.

_notes.page_subtitle: [PLACEHOLDER] {user_count} is a formatted integer. 'músicos y productores' uses masculine plural as default in es-ES — inclusive phrasing without gendered agreement issues.
_notes.signin_prompt: [PLACEHOLDER] {signin_link} is an inline hyperlink. ¿? framing creates natural invitation.

signin.page_subtitle: Inicia sesión para acceder a tu estudio.

_notes.page_title: [REVIEW] [GENDER HOOK] 'Bienvenido de nuevo' uses masculine default. Consider 'Bienvenido/a de nuevo' if the UI can render gender-adaptive strings.
_notes.signup_prompt: [PLACEHOLDER] {signup_link} is an inline hyperlink. ECHOCRAFT always uppercase.

profile_setup.page_subtitle: Cuéntanos algo sobre ti para personalizar tu experiencia.

_notes.page_subtitle: Kept concise to manage expansion risk.
_notes.field_role_option_producer: [REVIEW] [GENDER HOOK] Masculine form used as default (Productor / Compositor / Ingeniero / Diseñador). If the platform supports gender selection, all four role options should expose feminine variants.
_notes.avatar_upload_hint: [PLACEHOLDER] {max_size} is an integer. 'máx.' is standard es-ES abbreviation for máximo.

plan_selection.page_subtitle: Para artistas en solitario o equipos de producción al completo, tenemos el plan que encaja con tus necesidades creativas.
plan_selection.audience_tab_creator_description: Para músicos y productores en solitario
plan_selection.billing_free_trial_note: Comienza tu prueba gratuita, sin tarjeta de crédito.

_notes.audience_tab_creator: Brand Plan_Group name — kept as-is per ontology (plan_00000001, status: approved).
_notes.tier_label_starter: Brand tier name — not translated per ontology (plan_00000002, status: approved).
_notes.tier_label_pro: Brand tier name — not translated per ontology (plan_00000003).
_notes.tier_label_max: Brand tier name — not translated per ontology (plan_00000004).
_notes.tier_badge_popular: 'El más popular' — 14 chars. Slight expansion from English (12 chars). Monitor badge container width.
_notes.pricing_per_month: Displayed inline after price: '9,99 €/mes'. Currency symbol and formatting handled by billing system.
_notes.pricing_per_user: Displayed below per_month in Studio plans.

_notes.creator_starter_name: Plan name kept as-is per ontology. 'Creator' and 'Starter' are brand identifiers.
_notes.creator_starter_tagline: 'Haz tus primeras pistas' — imperative tú form per es-ES market guide. 'pistas' per ontology.
_notes.creator_pro_tagline: 'Flujo completo de composición' — shortened from English to manage expansion risk while retaining meaning.

plan_features.feature_includes_starter: Todas las funciones de Creator Starter
plan_features.feature_includes_studio_starter: Todas las funciones de Creator Starter
plan_features.feature_includes_studio_pro: Todo lo de Studio Starter, más:
plan_features.feature_includes_creator_pro: Todas las funciones de Creator Pro
plan_features.feature_includes_creator_max: Todas las funciones de Creator Max
plan_features.feature_includes_studio_pro_all: Todo lo de Studio Pro, más:

_notes.midi_editor: Ontology term: 'editor MIDI' (feat_00000001). Capitalised for list display.
_notes.piano_roll: Ontology term: 'Piano Roll' (feat_00000006) — anglicism preferred, kept as-is.
_notes.pattern_sequencer: Ontology term: 'secuenciador por patrones' (feat_00000002). Capitalised for display.
_notes.arrangement_timeline: Ontology term: 'línea de arreglos' (feat_00000007). Capitalised for display.
_notes.multitrack_recording_8: Ontology term: 'grabación multipista' (feat_00000009). Track count appended.
_notes.audio_comping: [REVIEW] Term not in ontology. 'Comping de audio' is a partial anglicism common in es-ES DAW contexts. Confirm with localization lead.
_notes.punch_in_recording: [REVIEW] Term not in ontology. Source note flags anglicism likely preferred. 'Grabación punch-in' retains the technical anglicism. Confirm with localization lead.
_notes.sample_library_20gb: Ontology term: 'librería de samples' (feat_00000008). Capacity appended.
_notes.effects_rack: Ontology term: 'rack de efectos' (feat_00000010). Capitalised for display.
_notes.mastering_chain: Ontology term: 'cadena de mástering' (feat_00000012). Note: ontology marks es-ES availability as 'not_available' — string provided for UI completeness; flag for product team if feature is gated.
_notes.loudness_analyzer: [REVIEW] Term not in ontology. 'Analizador de sonoridad' uses the standard ITU/EBU Spanish term for loudness analysis. Confirm with localization lead.
_notes.melody_generator: Ontology term: 'generador de melodías' (feat_00000011). Capitalised for display.
_notes.chord_progression_generator: Ontology term: 'generador de progresiones de acordes' (feat_00000014). Capitalised for display.
_notes.drum_pattern_generator: [REVIEW] Term not in ontology. 'Generador de patrones de batería' is a direct, natural es-ES rendering. Confirm with localization lead.
_notes.style_transfer: Ontology term: 'transferencia de estilos' (feat_00000013). Note: ontology marks es-ES availability as 'planned'.
_notes.export_mp3: Ontology term: 'exportar en mp3' (feat_00000005). Capitalised MP3 for display.
_notes.export_wav_flac: Ontology term: 'exportar en wav/flac' (feat_00000015). Capitalised WAV/FLAC for display.
_notes.real_time_jam_sessions: 'Jam sessions' retained as an anglicism — standard in es-ES music contexts.
_notes.one_click_distribution: 'Distribución con un clic' — natural es-ES phrasing.

confirmation.page_subtitle: Tu estudio está listo. Vamos a crear algo.

_notes.page_title: [PLACEHOLDER] {name} is the user's display name. 'Todo listo' refers to the setup state (neuter), avoiding gender agreement with the user.
_notes.checklist_plan: [PLACEHOLDER] {plan_name} inserts a localised plan name (e.g. 'Creator Pro').
